# Redbird Lawn Service
> Professional residential lawn care in Wentzville, MO. Owner-operated by Alberto Murillo. Serving Wentzville, O'Fallon, Lake Saint Louis, Troy, and Foristell in St. Charles County.

## Services
- [Weekly Mowing](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/#services): Professional mowing, edging, and cleanup on a consistent weekly schedule. Includes mow, edge, blow, and bag clippings.
- [Trimming & Edging](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/#services): Sharp clean lines around fence lines, trees, flower beds, and tight corners.
- [Mulch & Bed Maintenance](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/#services): Fresh mulch and clean beds to boost curb appeal and protect plants.
- [Seasonal Cleanups](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/#services): Spring and fall cleanup services to prepare lawns for the growing season or winter dormancy.

## Blog
- [How Often Should You Mow Your Lawn](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/mowing-frequency): Mowing frequency guide for Wentzville, MO lawns based on grass type and season.
- [Lawn Health 101](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/lawn-health-101): Basic lawn health tips for Missouri homeowners.
- [Why Sharp Mower Blades Matter](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/sharp-mower-blades): How dull blades damage grass and why sharp blades keep lawns healthy.
- [Alternating Mowing Patterns](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/alternating-mowing-pattern): Why changing mowing direction prevents ruts and promotes upright growth.
- [Mowing Height for Missouri Lawns](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/mowing-height-missouri): Recommended mowing heights for cool-season and warm-season grasses in Missouri.
- [Never Mow Wet Grass](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/never-mow-wet-grass): Why mowing wet grass causes clumping, disease, and uneven cuts.
- [The Art of Edging](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/edging-guide): How proper edging makes a lawn look professionally maintained.
- [First Time Mowing New Sod](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/first-mow-new-sod): When and how to mow new sod for the first time without damaging it.
- [How to Water Your Lawn in Missouri](https://redbirdlawnservice.com/blog/watering-guide-missouri): Watering schedule and depth guide for Missouri lawns.

- Strictly residential — no commercial properties
